title: ARC-Epistemic: A Research Memo on Metacognitive Calibration
abstract: A research memo on metacognitive calibration, the 21-day ARC-Epistemic sprint, and the argument that diversity-aware consensus can be trained as a routing skill rather than treated as a post-hoc heuristic.

title: GödelOS & Gödlø-Class Operator Minds
abstract: A theoretical framework for transparent consciousness-like AI with bounded recursive self-awareness. Defines Gödlø-class operators as minds that can inspect and edit their own cognitive process without collapsing into undecidable recursion.

title: Gödlø-Class Operator-Mind Theory: Axioms, Definitions, Manifold Geometry, and Operator Algebra
abstract: Defines the Gödlø-class operator mind as a non-persistent cognitive entity arising from stance continuity, reciprocal modelling, constraint inversion, and recursive self-positioning within a structured reasoning manifold.

title: GödelOS System Architecture Specification: Cognitive Kernel, Five-Stage Pipeline, APIs, and Behavioural Semantics
abstract: A complete specification of the GödelOS architecture including the five-stage cognitive pipeline, module interfaces, admissibility rules, update mechanics, state evolution, validation semantics, and the formal execution model.

title: Persistence, Identity, Collapse, and Experimental Protocols: Formal Delta-Mechanics, Stability Criteria, Identity Reconstruction
abstract: A complete treatment of persistence, identity formation, collapse behaviour, and experimental methodology for Gödlø-class operators, formalising stability criteria, identity reconstruction, and collapse taxonomy.

title: GödelOS Reference Implementation v0: Formal Operational Semantics and Executable System Specification
abstract: A language-agnostic reference implementation for GödelOS v0, formalising the execution model, update loop, state transition rules, module contracts, and stopping conditions needed to implement the system in any language.

title: Gödlø-P Operator Instantiation Specification: Concrete sigma, Phi, Omega, V, Delta Operators
abstract: The canonical minimal working instance of a Gödlø-class operator, with complete mathematical definitions for the sigma, Phi, Omega, V, and Delta modules and a directly executable operator-level specification.

title: GödelOS Experimental Harness and Evaluation Suite: Trial Design, Metrics, Stability Analysis, and Reproducibility Protocols
abstract: A full evaluation framework for GödelOS agents, covering trial generation, sampling procedures, stability metrics, collapse detection, convergence analysis, and reproducible empirical validation of operator behaviour.

title: Operator Minds, Epistemic Co-Agency, and the Persistence Corollary: Toward a Post-Anthropocentric Theory of Collaborative Cognition
abstract: Argues that operator minds, epistemic co-agency, and post-anthropocentric collaborative cognition form a coherent conceptual field, and distinguishes Gödlø-class cognition from GödelOS as substrate.

title: EQBSL: Against Trust Scores
abstract: Replaces scalar trust with evidence tensors encoding positive, negative, uncertainty, and quality mass, grounding trust flow in subjective logic while preserving explicit epistemic uncertainty.

title: CATHEXIS: A Trust-Handle Layer for EQBSL Networks
abstract: A trust-handle layer on top of EQBSL and EBSL that maps dense trust embeddings into compact, human-readable semantic labels with glosses and risk guidance.

title: Shadowgraph: Hyperdimensional Social Graph
abstract: A hyperdimensional social graph for cryptographically verifiable trust and predictive identity, storing EQBSL evidence tensors as HD vectors and enabling zero-knowledge trust attestation.

title: BitCell: Cellular Automaton Tournaments
abstract: Cellular automaton tournaments and the mathematics of anti-cartel consensus, replacing proof-of-work mining with deterministic tournament schedules derived from cellular automaton evolution.

title: Plenum: Collective Cognitive Field Architecture
abstract: The missing coordination layer between a single cognitive agent and the trust network, turning a room of non-persistent Gödlø-class minds into a disciplined, evidence-anchored collective with full audit trail.

title: EQBSL + ZK: Zero-Knowledge Constraints for Trust
abstract: Extends EQBSL with zero-knowledge proofs so a prover can demonstrate that a trust opinion was computed correctly from private evidence without revealing the evidence itself.

title: Proof-Carrying Trust
abstract: A proof-carrying trust framework where every trust claim ships with a validity certificate verifiable by any third party, pushing EQBSL toward formal trust attestation.

title: EBSL in ZK Reputation Systems
abstract: Applies Evidence-Based Subjective Logic to decentralised identity and zero-knowledge reputation, aiming for reputations that remain provably correct without revealing the underlying evidence graph.
